name: Chocolate Coconut Pecan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or grease them.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. In a large bowl, cream butter with an electric mixer until smooth.
5. Add sugar and beat until fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
6. Add melted chocolate and beat well.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture, mixing until smooth.
8. Stir in coconut flakes, chopped pecans, and chocolate chips.
9. Drop dough from a teaspoon onto prepared cookie sheets, leaving about 2 inches between each cookie.
10. Press half of pecans on top of each cookie.
11. Bake for 10 to 13 minutes or until set, rotating the pan halfway through.
12. Transfer cookies to wire racks to cool completely.
13. Store in an airtight container for up to 1 week or freeze for up to 2 months.
